---
title: "\'Three Generations: So-so or Cela Fera\'"
---

## \'Three Generations: So-so or Cela Fera\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1896
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Short Story in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 6.24 (Oct 1896) 215-220

### Notes

No author is given but it is part of a series written by CMY

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
